qa_pairs.question: What modules are required to run ambertools/21 on CPUs within the StdEnv/2020 environment?
qa_pairs.answer: To run ambertools/21 on CPUs in the StdEnv/2020 environment, you need to load the following modules: StdEnv/2020 gcc/9.3.0 openmpi/4.0.3 scipy-stack ambertools/21.

qa_pairs.question: What modules are needed for running ambertools/21 on GPUs (CUDA) in the StdEnv/2020 environment?
qa_pairs.answer: For running ambertools/21 on GPUs (CUDA) in the StdEnv/2020 environment, the required modules are: StdEnv/2020 gcc/9.3.0 cuda/11.4 openmpi/4.0.3 scipy-stack ambertools/21.

qa_pairs.question: Are there any specific notes provided for ambertools/21 when used with StdEnv/2020?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, the notes for ambertools/21 with StdEnv/2020 specify GCC, FlexiBLAS & FFTW.

qa_pairs.question: Which CUDA version is utilized by ambertools/21 when run on GPUs under StdEnv/2020?
qa_pairs.answer: ambertools/21 utilizes cuda/11.4 when running on GPUs under the StdEnv/2020 environment.

qa_pairs.question: What versions of gcc and openmpi are used with ambertools/21 modules in the StdEnv/2020 configuration for both CPU and GPU operations?
qa_pairs.answer: For ambertools/21 modules in the StdEnv/2020 configuration, both CPU and GPU operations use gcc/9.3.0 and openmpi/4.0.3.
